value: CREATE TABLE INTERIOR_WEB_RE_TRANSACTION_{formatted_time}_STAGE(CITY_DISTRICT_ID INT,BATCH_ID INT,PAGE INT,CITY_NAME VARCHAR(100),DISTRICT_NAME VARCHAR(100),ADDRESS VARCHAR(100),COMMUNITY VARCHAR(500),TOTAL_PRICE_10K VARCHAR(500),TRANSACTION_DATE VARCHAR(500),UNIT_PRICE VARCHAR(500),TOTAL_TSUBO VARCHAR(500),REAL_SPACE_PERCENT VARCHAR(500),TYPE VARCHAR(500),HOUSE_AGE VARCHAR(500),LEVEL VARCHAR(500),MAIN_PURPOSE VARCHAR(500),TRANSACTION_TARGET VARCHAR(500),BUILDING_STRUCTURE VARCHAR(500),CAR_PARKING_PRICE_10K VARCHAR(500),MANAGE_UNIT_YN VARCHAR(500),ELEVATOR_YN VARCHAR(500),NOTE VARCHAR(500),SCRAPED_TIME DATETIME(4),PRIMARY KEY (CITY_DISTRICT_ID, CITY_NAME, DISTRICT_NAME, ADDRESS, SCRAPED_TIME));

CREATE TABLE INTERIOR_WEB_RE_TRANSACTION_{formatted_time}_CHECK_LIST(RECORD_ID INT NOT NULL,CITY_NAME VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, DISTRICT_NAME VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ESTABLISH_TIME DATETIME(4), SCRAPED_TIME DATETIME(4), TOTAL_ROW_COUNT INT, DONE_YN VARCHAR(2), PRIMARY KEY(RECORD_ID, CITY_NAME, DISTRICT_NAME));
